name: pexo
description: AI video generation with automatic model selection — describe what you want and Pexo picks the best model across 10+ engines (Seedance, Kling, Veo, Sora, and more), writes the prompts, generates every shot, and returns a finished, multi-shot video with music, subtitles, and transitions.

interface.shortDescription: Finished AI videos with automatic model selection
interface.longDescription: Pexo turns a coding agent into a full video production studio. Describe what you want — Pexo selects the best model for each shot across 10+ engines, writes the prompts, generates every asset, and assembles a finished, publish-ready video with music, subtitles, transitions, and lip sync. Accepts text, images, URLs, scripts, or audio. No prompt engineering, no model picking, no editing. A 15-second 3-shot product ad renders in under 8 minutes.
defaultPrompt: Make a 15-second product ad from this photo
Turn this script into a narrated explainer video
Create a vertical TikTok video from these images
Make a 30-second brand video with music
